name: per-burrow-pqueue-with-global-cap
description: Run loop uses one PQueue(concurrency=1) per burrowId for FIFO ordering of runs against the same burrow, wrapped by a single PQueue(concurrency=globalConcurrency, default 8) that bounds how many burrows are driven in parallel. RunsRepo.claimById(runId) does an atomic queued→running transition inside a SQLite transaction so a doubly-enqueued runId can't be claimed twice. AbortController per-burrow lets stop({force:true}) signal in-flight handlers; finalize-on-throw turns a handler exception into a 'failed' run instead of silently leaking. Phase 4 plugs in the real handler that drives BurrowProvider + AgentRuntime; Phase 2 keeps it injectable for testability.
